title: AI Documentation & Quality Engineering
about: Software QA engineer and technical lead with 25+ years across enterprise SaaS, developer platforms, mobile, and consumer hardware. Built and scaled QA teams from the ground up and embedded quality as a development-phase discipline.

MFA in Creative Writing (SFSU) and Certificate in Professional Editing (UC Berkeley Extension) applied directly to the work: sharper documentation, clearer bug reports, more effective cross-functional communication.

education.details: Faculty Lecturer & Adjunct Professor. Directed 12-member editorial team for Transfer Literary Magazine.

professional_development: Certificate in Professional Editing, UC Berkeley Extension (2023)
Application Development with Ruby on Rails, General Assembly (2012)

skill_categories.heading: Testing
skill_categories.items: Manual & automated testing, E2E, regression, smoke, exploratory, performance

skill_categories.heading: Tools
skill_categories.items: Cypress.io, Selenium, Cucumber, RSpec, Appium, JMeter, SauceLabs, Charles Proxy, Postman, JIRA, TestRail, CI/CD

skill_categories.heading: Languages
skill_categories.items: Ruby, Node.js, JavaScript, Python, Hack/HHVM, React/Redux, REST APIs

skill_categories.heading: AI/ML
skill_categories.items: LLM output evaluation, agentic workflow validation, Anthropic SDK, docs-as-tests

skill_categories.heading: Leadership
skill_categories.items: Team building, headcount planning, technical interviewing, QA advocacy

experience.title: Independent Contractor — AI Documentation & QA
experience.description: Research and develop QA workflows for AI and agentic systems: spec-to-prose pipelines, prompt regression testing, LLM output validation. Built ‘The Tailor’ — a four-agent job application tool using the Anthropic SDK.

experience.title: Technical Lead Manager and Staff Quality Assurance Engineer
experience.description: Quality authority across eight concurrent feature teams in engineering, developer relations, and product. Launched Block Kit and Workflows on Hack/HHVM, React/Redux, Electron, WebSockets. Scaled QA 3x across SF, Vancouver, and Pune. Drove test coverage to 90% with Cypress.io shift-left strategy. Directed four engineers; promoted three to senior roles.

experience.title: Quality Engineer
experience.description: Architected a full-stack E2E testing platform on Cucumber, Ruby on Rails, and Selenium WebDriver with SauceLabs and Circle CI. Designed performance testing strategies using JMeter. Implemented mobile distribution pipelines for thousands of enterprise customers.

experience.title: Quality Engineer
experience.description: Built a Ruby-based REST API testing framework with OAuth integration. Engineered a custom Ruby gem for automated RSpec test generation. Established an org-wide JMeter performance testing practice; delivered curriculum to 30+ developers, reducing load testing time 70%.
